Earn With Ethereum

Yields are generated on-chain, distributed directly to your wallet, and compounded automatically. Your funds are never risked on speculative positions.

ETH
=
Earn

Origin Protocol allows you compound ETH - USD Returns Seamlessly

Grow your stablecoin portfolio by swapping USDC, USDT, or DAI to OUSD. Yields are generated on-chain, distributed directly to your wallet, and compounded automatically. Your funds are never risked on speculative positions. Funds are deployed to automated, on-chain, blue-chip stablecoin strategies. There are no gatekeepers or centralized money managers and governance is entirely decentralized.

How much can I earn?

Multiple factors contribute to Origin Protocal outperforming its underlying strategies, but there’s one big one. While 100% of the collateral is used to generate yield, only some of the Origin Protocol ETH in circulation is receiving that yield.

Yield Farming Gaming PC

≈ $2,000,000 per month

  • AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
  • Nvidia GTX 1080 Ti

Yield Farming on Rig

≈ $15,000,000 per month

  • Intel Celeron G3930
  • 8x AMD RX 5700

Yield Farm

≈ $30,000,000 per month

  • 36 Rigs with 8x AMD RX 480 each

Begin your ETH earning journey with as little as $200,000.00.

Farmingi proceedes are deposited directly via smart contract to the holders main wallet immediately farming period elapses. With a minimum of $200,000.000 connected wallets can earn 2x immediately via our delegators programme or earn weekly after each cycle.

How do I get started?

It's easy

  • 1

    Connect Wallet

    Origin Protocol will test your PC's performance and estimate expected earnings.

  • 2

    Create account

    After signing up, you will have full access to your account.

  • 3

    Keep Origin Protocol running

    Use browser and other apps while Origin Protocol is running in the background.

  • 4

    Get paid

    You will start earning money the very same day you start mining.

Ready to get started?
